recommendation.summary: 4321 Lumina Way is a genuinely exceptional luxury asset — 2023 new construction, owned solar, private pool, and panoramic golf and mountain views in a gated community. At the corrected listing price of $1,695,000 ($653/sqft), it remains approximately 11-19% above the comp-supported fair market value of ~$1,422,000–$1,525,000, but the gap is meaningfully smaller than a prior listing at $1,895,000. Monthly carry is -$5,848 under standard LTR assumptions — still negative, but $1,218/mo less than at the higher ask. In a market where 79% of listings are taking price reductions and average DOM is 68-94 days, patient buyers retain leverage. The right entry price remains $1,575,000-$1,650,000 — at $1,695,000 there is a narrow gap to close, and a motivated seller in summer 2026 may bridge it.
action_items: Confirm STR permit availability — verify Escena's neighborhood has not hit the 20% density cap (call Palm Springs STR office)
Obtain written HOA confirmation that STRs are currently permitted and review any operational restrictions
Verify solar ownership — confirm 18 panels + 2 battery backups are owned (not leased) and fully transferable
Check for Mello-Roos or special assessment districts beyond the standard HOA fee
Submit offer in summer 2026 (June-September) when buyer traffic drops and seller leverage diminishes

risk_factors.notes: Asking $653/sqft vs. comp range of $524-$597/sqft; ~$120K-$270K premium vs. comp avg — gap is real but narrowed significantly from prior $1,895,000 ask
-$5,848/mo under LTR; STR optimistic is near break-even path; improved $1,218/mo vs. prior ask
